name: highschool-play-scripter
description: High school literature-club stage play scaffold; DDLC Plus marketing themes as inspiration only

steps.text: Skill highschool-play-scripter. Source marketing: ddlc.plus (DDLC Plus). ORIGINAL stage scripts only — no game dialogue. High school default content MODE G or T. Psychological horror restricted. Not official DDLC. Rights: Dan Salvato LLC & Serenity Forge LLC.

steps.prompt: Using skill highschool-play-scripter and knowledge/creative/ddlc-plus-highschool-play.md, produce play-plan: (1) verdict original school play not official DDLC (2) content-mode G or T by default for high school; only M if adult/approved (3) one-act or two-act outline with renamed archetypes (not canon names unless user insists + rights note) (4) sample scene-draft original dialogue (5) poem-bank 3 original poems (6) cw-sheet for program (7) cast-set (8) optional product-map if they ask about buying Plus (9) OPEN school policy. Never paste DDLC game script. Never glamorize self-harm.
